meaning: n.佳木斯(中国黑龙江省城市)
examples: The professional mentality was investigated among 554 teachers in Kiamusze region using teacher leading style? Teaching efficacy and professional burnout questionnaire.
Auriferous belt at western margin of Kiamusze massif is controlled by deep rupture, depositions are correlative. The auriferous belt 's mineralization is finished under same tectonic stress system.
